Returns {event_id, path}.","server_ts_change":"Register writeTraceEventTool in setupTools() array. 1 line addition.","tools_index_change":"Export writeTraceEventTool from tools/index.ts.","rationale":"Coord agents run in Copilot context, cannot write to filesystem directly. recommendations: Decouple D3 from dashboardPanel: build spiderWebBundle.ts as independent IIFE. If D3 bundling fails CI, Spider Web section is omitted without affecting existing dashboard sections.
Codegen TypeScript registry from Python registry.py via scripts/sync-agent-registry.mjs. Run as CI lint step. Prevents silent drift between Python topology and TypeScript runtime constants.
Phase 1: use MandateResult *.result.json as trace source (no new JSONL format). FSWatcher already fires on these. Reduces blast radius: no new MCP tool, no new JSONL schema, finish-events only.
Gate TraceFileWatcher behind devsteps.enableAgentActivityDashboard setting (default true). Kill-switch for unexpected FSWatcher file-descriptor pressure on large workspaces.
Phase agent .md changes last: deploy TypeScript infrastructure first, verify in CI, then add TraceLogger calls to coord agents. Agents work without traces; dashboard shows static topology.
